metadata.name: Potential Directories Review Queue
metadata.description: Unverified or partially verified candidate directories that still need duplicate checks, DR lookup, pricing review, or submission review before promotion into the canonical dataset.
metadata.note: Entries here are not part of the live backlink tables until they are reviewed and moved into data/directories.json. Seeded with candidates from John Rush's directory list.

directories.name: DevHunt
directories.description: Launchpad for developer tools and related products.
directories.reasonToReview: Promising dev-tool launch platform but still needs DR, pricing, and duplicate review.
directories.notes: Source note: 'World #1 launchpad for Dev Tools'.

directories.name: AllGPTs
directories.description: GPT directory with significant traffic according to source notes.
directories.reasonToReview: Relevant AI/GPT directory but still needs DR, pricing, and duplicate review.
directories.notes: Source note: 'GPT directory with over million visits'.

directories.name: Hosted Software
directories.description: Directory focused on hosted software discovery.
directories.reasonToReview: Looks relevant but still needs DR, pricing, and duplicate review.
directories.notes: Source note: 'One of the most popular directory of hosted software'.

directories.name: OSS Software
directories.description: Directory of open source tools and alternatives.
directories.reasonToReview: Strong open-source angle but still needs DR, pricing, and duplicate review.
directories.notes: Source note: 'Top directory of open source tool and alternatives'.

directories.name: Next JS Starter
directories.description: Directory of Next.js boilerplates and starter kits.
directories.reasonToReview: Useful niche directory but still needs DR, pricing, and duplicate review.
directories.notes: Source note: 'Top directory in the world of next js boilerplates'.

directories.name: LLM Models
directories.description: Directory focused on large language models and related tools.
directories.reasonToReview: Relevant AI directory but still needs DR, pricing, and duplicate review.
directories.notes: Source note: 'The biggest Large Language Models'.

directories.name: MVP Wizards
directories.description: Directory of freelancers and agencies building MVPs.
directories.reasonToReview: Service-oriented listing site that may fit the broader backlink dataset but needs policy review.
directories.notes: Source note: 'List of freelancers and agencies building MVPs'.

directories.name: AI Tool For
directories.description: Directory of AI tools and related categories.
directories.reasonToReview: Likely useful AI tools directory but still needs DR, pricing, and duplicate review.
directories.notes: Source note: 'A list of AI tools for...'.

directories.name: All Website Builders
directories.reasonToReview: Name is clear but URL still needs confirmation before review can proceed.
directories.notes: Source note: 'TOP website builders / All website builders'. Needs URL confirmation.

directories.name: SaaS Software
directories.reasonToReview: Directly relevant but still needs DR, pricing, and duplicate review.

directories.name: Best AI Agents
directories.description: Directory of AI agents and tools for building agents.
directories.reasonToReview: Potentially useful AI directory but still needs DR, pricing, and duplicate review.
directories.notes: Source note: 'Best AI agents and tools to build agents'.

directories.name: DirectoryHunt
directories.description: Launchpad for directories and side projects.
directories.reasonToReview: Likely relevant launch/discovery site but still needs DR, pricing, and duplicate review.
directories.notes: Source note: 'Top launchpad for directories and side projects'.
